---
title: "Hakkımda"
sidebar: false
---

<div class="about-header">
  <img src="assets/images/vesikalik.jpeg" class="profile-pic" alt="Profil fotoğrafı">

  <h1>Oğuzhan Şenel</h1>
  <p class="about-subtitle">Project & Operations Planning | Cross-functional Coordination </p>

  <p><a href="docs/cv.pdf" class="cv-button">Özgeçmişi indir</a></p>
</div>

## Education

- B.S., Mechatronics Engineering, Duzce University, Turkey, 2014 - 2019.
- M.S., Composite Material Technologies, Duzce University, Turkey, 2020 - 2022.
- M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

## Experience
1. Mersan Metal, Planning Engineer, 2024 - still
2. Batı Çelik, Project Engineer, 2021 - 2024

## Projects

1. DUBAP-2021.06.06-1168

## Publications

1. O. Şenel, G. Samtaş, Critical Methane Density Detection Robot Prototype Design and Production, Manufacturing Technologies and Applications, 3(1), 33-46, 2022

## Competencies

<span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
<span class="skill-tag">HTML</span>
<span class="skill-tag">CSS</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Arduino</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Autocad</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Inventor</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Vault</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Solidworks</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Solidedge</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Catia v5</span>
<span class="skill-tag">CorelDRAW</span>
<span class="skill-tag">DIA</span>
<span class="skill-tag">MS Project</span>

## Hobbies

<div>
  <span class="skill-tag">Aquariums</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Chess</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Video Games</span>
</div>
